overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through Night City's neon-drenched downtown district at night. The scene features wet streets reflecting colorful holographic advertisements, moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic, and towering futuristic skyscrapers with massive digital displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with digital billboards

events.description: character begins walking forward along the sidewalk
futuristic vehicles pass by on the adjacent multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and observing the neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street with headlights on
pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead of the character

entered.detail: massive vertical billboard displaying pink and purple neon advertisement with animated graphics
tall skyscraper with illuminated windows and geometric facade patterns
blue and yellow metal railing separating sidewalk from the street
tall pole with traffic signals and attached street signs

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit commercial sidewalk at night, passing futuristic vehicles on the adjacent street. Massive digital billboards illuminate the left side while a modern glass tower rises on the right, with moderate pedestrian traffic sharing the path.

events.description: entering narrower canyon-like passage between tall dark buildings
approaching intersection with visible crosswalk and traffic lights ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the enclosed space between skyscrapers, approaching the open intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead toward the intersection

entered.detail: smooth dark concrete wall of the adjacent skyscraper creating an enclosed feeling
enclosed walkway connecting the high-rise buildings above the street level
small illuminated sign with purple graphics mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a narrow, canyon-like walkway between towering dark buildings, creating a more enclosed and intimate atmosphere. The character continues forward as the space opens up toward a distant intersection with visible traffic infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with palm trees and crosswalks

events.description: crossing wide street at yellow zebra crossing with other pedestrians
entering covered plaza area with overhead structures and commercial signage

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians, heading toward the plaza entrance

notable_agents.action: futuristic car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the edge of the open plaza area
massive concrete highway structure spanning across the plaza
brightly painted yellow pedestrian crossing stripes on the asphalt
small booth structure with yellow and green coloring near the metro entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban plaza with palm trees and a massive elevated highway overhead. The character crosses the distinctive yellow crosswalk with other pedestrians, then approaches a covered commercial area with a small yellow kiosk visible near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial plaza with massive overhead holographic displays

events.description: entering area with massive overhead holographic displays casting colorful shifting light
navigating around parked vehicles along the walkway edge

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered plaza beneath towering holographic advertisements, observing the futuristic architecture

notable_agents.action: red futuristic truck parked along the curb with hazard lights on

entered.detail: giant ceiling-mounted hologram showing shifting colorful abstract patterns and advertisements
building facade illuminated with bright red neon lighting and vertical signage
futuristic red pickup truck parked on the street side
commercial entrance with glowing signage and reflective glass doors

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered commercial plaza dominated by massive overhead holographic displays that bathe the area in shifting neon colors. The environment features futuristic storefronts with red neon accents and parked vehicles along the walkway, creating a dense cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched downtown district that evolves from a bright commercial sidewalk into a dense, holographic plaza. It begins by tracking a character past massive digital billboards and futuristic vehicles, moving alongside a towering glass skyscraper. As the path narrows, the environment shifts into a canyon-like walkway between dark buildings before opening up toward a distant intersection. The scene then expands into a wide urban plaza featuring palm trees and an elevated highway, where the character crosses a yellow crosswalk toward a covered commercial area. Finally, the camera enters a semi-covered plaza dominated by shifting neon holographic displays and storefronts with red accents, completing the transition into a dense cyberpunk atmosphere.
